notes: DOI lookup for 10.17182/hepdata.89409 returned DOI Not Found during browser verification.
HEPData search for 89409 resolves to a CMS child datatable in publication 10.17182/hepdata.87255, table DOI 10.17182/hepdata.87255.v1/t4, not to the LHCb arXiv:2003.04831 paper.
Exact HEPData searches for the LHCb title/arXiv and collaboration did not return a target record during browser verification.

saved_artifacts.description: INSPIRE API metadata for the target paper.
CDS JSON metadata for the target paper.
ROOT macro for Figure 3e, the P5prime plot. Contains direct P5prime graph points and asymmetric plot errors.
YAML fit input from flavio.zip. Contains underlying FL/S_i/AFB values with stat, syst, and correlation matrices.

fig3e_p5prime_direct.notes: The direct P5prime ROOT macro has graph y-errors only; it does not label or separate statistical and systematic components and does not include a covariance matrix.

measurements_yml_underlying_s_observable.notes: The YAML stores fitted FL/S_i/AFB values as central +stat -stat +/- syst and includes per-bin correlation matrices. It does not store a direct P5prime covariance matrix.
